Enable persistency of maps and pairs of <DetId, const unsigned int>.
L1-uGT emulator: fix value of 3-muon mass with "duplicate" muons
Triton server updates + client improvements and bug fixes
Add rntupleWriteOptions param to NanoAODRNtupleOutputModule [port from RNTUPLE_X]
Fix a typo in ParameterSetDescription exception message
update the DQM legacy root file used in a bunch of SiStrip unit tests
Fix HGCAL EM scale factor application
Modernization of `FourVectorHLT` and related HLT DQM Configurations
[CPP23][FW] Fix for non-const lvalue reference of type E
Check that entries for missing FEDs have zero length

Reuse the device queue from produce in transform
Extend an exception message to mention fillDescriptions() function
Use of emit() instead of operator() for signals emission.
[mkFit] fix charge flip bug in propagationToPlane
Moved storage related code to FWStorage subsystem
Do not pass nullptr to memcpy in SiPixelRawToCusterKernel
Add MIPs sum and noise quadratic sum to HGCAL calibration cell handler

MTD Validation: fix for additional plots in Primary4DVertexHarvester
Make host and device caching allocators independent
Remove vertex smearing for CloseBy samples in the barrel.
[HGCAL] Update SiPM typecode regex to support optional suffix
Fix memory leak in `auto_ptr` read rule test
TkAl add maxclusters for PV validation
Phase2-gex200 Update the V19 related scenarios using the drawings for the endcap calorimeter region
[RECO] Reset AddDirectory from true to false
